prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次约 9314→7592→6609→7649→7586，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2021–2023 年逐年上升（位次数字减小），2024–2025 年小幅后移企稳；2025 年基准约 7586 名；该校在云南省理科/物理类计划数：2021 年 58 人、2022 年 56 人、2023 年 58 人、2024 年 60 人、2025 年 59 人；2026 年计划 56 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 5.1%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 88 名，近年排名在 86–102 名之间波动，整体稳定；2025 年高考周期内该校出现师德师风相关舆情（教师被指性骚扰学生），评价偏负面，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；抖音综合热度排名第 90，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中游水平；未见明显投档断档记录；药学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心王牌专业，对高分考生有较强吸引力；中药学类、生物制药等关联专业亦受益于药学 A+ 的学科辐射。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医药类相关专业（临床医学、药学等）社会热度持续偏热，2024 年临床医学 ，属「推荐」级别；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年物理类 17.33 万大幅增长约 32%，竞争显著加剧；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校；该校在云南省招生占比约 2%–3%（2024 年约 2.7%），属跨省招生正常比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 2024–2025 年企稳在 7600 名附近、2026 年小幅缩招约 5.1%（位次下移因素）、本省物理类考生大幅增长约 32%（位次上移因素）以及声誉偏负面（轻微抑制），考生规模扩张的竞争加剧效应强于缩招的缓解效应，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年基准略有后移；预测最低位次约 7555 名，区间 7055–8055 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（杰出药学家实验班）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）
- 临床药学
- 中药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源与开发、中药制药）
- 化工与制药类（制药工程、食品营养与健康、环境科学）
- 生物医药数据科学
- 生物统计学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（7055–8055 名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7055 名）可重点冲击药学杰出药学家实验班、拔尖创新班等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>8055 名）建议以三档为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 9314→7592→6609→7649→7586, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers) from 2021 to 2023, with a slight decline and stabilization in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 7586th place. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 58 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 59 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 56, a slight reduction of about 5.1% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 86–102 in recent years, overall stable; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics (a teacher accused of sexual harassment), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 90th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a mid-level; no obvious admission gaps recorded; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the core flagship major, strongly attracting high-scoring students; related majors like Traditional Chinese Pharmacy and Biopharmaceuticals also benefit from the radiation of the A+ Pharmacy discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical-related majors (clinical medicine, pharmacy, etc.) continue to be socially popular; in 2024, clinical medicine is rated as 'recommended'; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the 173,300 physics category takers in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province is about 2%–3% (about 2.7% in 2024), a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio, with no obvious regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 7600 in 2024–2025, a slight enrollment reduction of about 5.1% in 2026 (downward ranking factor), a significant increase of about 32% in local physics category examinees (upward ranking factor), and a slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), the competition intensification effect from the expansion of examinees outweighs the easing effect from enrollment reduction; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7555, with a range of 7055–8055.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Pharmacy Category (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Clinical Pharmacy
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy Category (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Traditional Chinese Medicine Pharmaceuticals)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biomedical Data Science
- Biostatistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (7055–8055), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<7055), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Pharmacy Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class and Top Innovation Class; for rankings near the upper limit (>8055), choose Tier 3 as a safe option.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024 年文科最低位次依次约 2074→2148→1914→1628，整体呈波动前移趋势（位次数字减小），2024 年基准约 1628 名；2025 年该校在云南省未招收历史类考生；该校在云南省文科/历史类计划数：2021 年 5 人、2022 年 7 人、2023 年 3 人、2024 年 3 人；2025 年无招生；2026 年历史类计划 7 人，较 2024 年大幅扩招约 133%，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 88 名，近年排名稳定；2025 年高考周期内该校出现师德师风相关舆情，评价偏负面；抖音热度一般；未见投档断档记录；药学 A+ 为该校核心优势，但文科招生专业（经济管理试验班、英语）与药学 A+ 学科无直接关联，学科辐射效应有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科招生专业为经济管理试验班（医药方向）和英语（医药方向），经济管理类社会热度分化观望（2024 年 ），英语类一般观望；本省 2026 年历史类考生估算约 14.87 万，较 2025 年历史类 11.24 万增长约 32%，竞争加剧；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校；该校在云南省文科招生占比极小，无明显地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024 年基准位次约 1628 名、2026 年历史类计划从 3 人扩至 7 人（大幅扩招，位次下移因素）、本省历史类考生增长约 32%（位次上移因素），扩招的缓解效应强于考生增加的竞争效应，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2024 年基准明显后移；预测最低位次约 3000 名，区间 2500–3500 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济管理试验班（医药方向）（工商管理、健康服务与管理、医疗产品管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无其他专业达到二档难度。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语（医药方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 文科仅有两个招生专业，位次在预测区间（2500–3500 名）内建议以经济管理试验班为主目标；位次明显优于区间下限（<2500 名）可冲刺该专业；位次接近区间上限（>3500 名）建议英语专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for liberal arts were approximately 2074→2148→1914→1628, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a baseline of about 1628 in 2024; in 2025, the university did not admit history category students in Yunnan Province; the planned numbers for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan Province: 5 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024; no enrollment in 2025; in 2026, the history category plan is 7 students, a significant expansion of about 133% compared to 2024, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion related to teacher ethics and conduct; Douyin popularity is average; no records of enrollment gaps; Pharmacy A+ is the core advantage, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, English) are not directly related to the Pharmacy A+ discipline, with limited disciplinary spillover effects.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors are Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction); social popularity of economic management is divided and wait-and-see (2024), English is generally wait-and-see; the estimated number of history category students in the province in 2026 is about 148,700, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, intensifying competition; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university; the proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Yunnan Province is very small, with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of about 1628, the 2026 history category plan expanding from 3 to 7 students (significant expansion, downward ranking factor), and the 32% increase in local history category students (upward ranking factor), the easing effect of expansion is stronger than the competitive effect of increased students. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift downward compared to the 2024 baseline; predicted minimum ranking is about 3000, with a range of 2500–3500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other majors reach Tier 2 difficulty.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only two enrollment majors in liberal arts. If the ranking is within the predicted range (2500–3500), it is recommended to target the Economic Management Experimental Class as the main goal; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2500), you can aim for this major; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3500), it is recommended to use English as a safety option.
